title: Dependency Controlling User Access

posts.author: bglick (Bradley Glick)
posts.cookedHtml: Can monday.com prevent a user from being unable to work on an item until the item is completed? I know there is a dependency column, but this seems more closely related to the Gantt chart. We would like the user to not have access to edit that item until the item before it is completed

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bradley! We currently do not offer a feature that would ‘lock’ an item from editing until another item is complete.

That said, our product team is eager for this kind of feedback to include in their discussions for future improvement. This feedback can be submitted directly to a dedicated section of our community page. Learn more here
